top3.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.country, c.name AS circuit, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.country, c.name AS circuit, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.country, c.name AS circuit, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name = 'European Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.country, c.name AS circuit, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.country, c.name AS circuit, c.location
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name = 'European Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%'
ORDER BY r.year ASC
LIMIT 1;
